title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 28 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 28 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report March 28 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 28/03/2024
E iron ore futures tight. The main contract has been changed to I2409, closed at 758, an decrease of 0.85% throughout the day;Market wait-and-see sentiment increased. Some traders adopt separate quotations; Some steel mills purchased on demand.
